exceptions.reason: arena-bulk-action-bar's host renders role="region", not toolbar -- the same stopgap React's BulkActionBar.jsx carries, from before this catalog had a toolbar pattern; now that toolbar exists, this is a real gap in the component, not the catalog.
The per-action buttons and the Clear button are plain elements in normal Tab order -- there is no roving tabindex, no single shared tab stop for the group.
No keydown handling anywhere in the file; arrow keys do nothing.
Same as ArrowRight -- no keydown handling exists at all.
